sub_modules.fp_mult_unpack: Unpacks IEEE-754 operands into sign, exponent, significand, and special-case flags.
sub_modules.fp_mult_multiply_exp: Multiplies 24-bit significands and computes the unbiased result exponent.
sub_modules.fp_mult_normalize: Normalizes the 48-bit product and extracts guard, round, and sticky bits.
sub_modules.fp_mult_round_rne: Applies round-to-nearest-even and adjusts exponent on mantissa carry.
sub_modules.fp_mult_pack: Applies IEEE-754 special-case priority, overflow/underflow handling, and packs the final 32-bit result.
